zh.Normanton, Metropolitan Borough of Wakef: 英國英格蘭盧特藍德諾曼東
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Woodruffe於1356年出生在英國越可爾伍利時，他的父親Richard Woodruff34歲，母親Mabel Pudsy29歲。他於1325年與Woodrove在英國越可爾達爾費爾德結婚。他去世於1397年9月9日在英國越可爾諾曼東享年41歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭盧特藍德諾曼東。

zh-hans.Normanton, Metropolitan Borough of Wakef: 英国英格兰盧特藍德諾曼東
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Woodruffe于1356年出生在英国越可爾伍利时，他的父亲Richard Woodruff34岁，母亲Mabel Pudsy29岁。他于1325年与Woodrove在英国越可爾達爾費爾德结婚。他去世于1397年9月9日在英国越可爾諾曼東享年41岁，埋葬在英国英格兰盧特藍德諾曼東。

nameMeanings.name: Woodruffe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Woodruff
meanings: English: from Middle English woderove ‘woodruff, sweet woodruff’ (Old English wudurofe), a sweet-scented plant. The leaves of the plant have a sweet smell and the surname may also have been a nickname for one who used it as a perfume, or perhaps an ironical nickname for a malodorous person. Alternatively, perhaps a topographic name for someone who lived at or near a place where woodruff grew. There may have been some confusion with Woodrow .

History: Two English families brought the name Woodruff to the American colonies: those of Matthew Woodruff and of John and Ann Woodruffe. The latter migrated to Lynn, MA, from Kent, and moved to Southampton, Long Island, NY, before 1640. John and Ann's many descendants were established in NJ, NC, and SC by 1790. The city of Woodruff, SC, is named for this family. The name is variously spelled Woodrove, Woodroffe, Woodruffe, Woodrough, and Woodruff in colonial records.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Woodruffe was born in 1356, in Woolley, Yorkshire, England, his father, Richard Woodruff, was 34 and his mother, Mabel Pudsy, was 29. He married Woodrove in 1325, in Darfield, Yorkshire, England. He died on 9 September 1397, in Normanton, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 41, and was buried in Normanton, Rutland, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Woodruffe est né en 1356, à Woolley, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Richard Woodruff, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Mabel Pudsy, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Woodrove en 1325, à Darfield, Everwyck, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 9 septembre 1397, à Normanton, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterré à Normanton, Rutland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Woodruffe 1356 in Woolley, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Woodruff 34 und seine Mutter Mabel Pudsy 29. Er hat 1325 in Darfield, Yorkshire, England Woodrove geheiratet. Er starb am 9. September 1397 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Normanton, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Normanton, Rutland, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Woodruffe è nato il nel 1356 nel Woolley, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Richard Woodruff, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Mabel Pudsy, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Woodrove nel 1325, nel Darfield, Yorkshire, England. Morì il 9 settembre 1397, nel Normanton, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolto a Normanton, Rutland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Woolley, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアウリー
ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Woodruffeが1356年にイギリスヨークシュアイアウリーで生まれた時，父Richard Woodruffは34歳，母Mabel Pudsyは29歳であった。1325年にイギリスヨークシュアイアダルフィールドでWoodroveと結婚した。彼は1397年9月9日にイギリスヨークシュアイアノーマントンで41歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスルトランドノーマントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Woodruffe(이)가 1356년 영국 요르크실르 보리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Woodruff(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Mabel Pudsy(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1325년 영국 요르크실르 더르필드에서 Woodrove(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1397년 9월 9일 영국 요르크실르 노먼턴에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 루틀랜드 노먼턴에 묻혔다.

mn.Normanton, Metropolitan Borough of Wakef: Normanton, Roteland, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Woodruffe nasceu em 1356, em Woolley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Woodruff, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Mabel Pudsy, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Woodrove em 1325, em Darfield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 9 de setembro de 1397, em Normanton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 41 anos, e foi sepultado em Normanton, Rutland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Woodruffe родился в 1356 г. в местности вулли, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Woodruff было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Mabel Pudsy, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Woodrove в 1325 г. в местности дарфиелд, еркшир, Англия. Он умер 9 сентября 1397 г. в местности нормантон, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 41 год и был похоронен в местности нормантон, рутланд, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Woodruffe nació en 1356, en Woolley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Woodruff, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Mabel Pudsy, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Woodrove en 1325, en Darfield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Murió el 9 de septiembre de 1397, en Normanton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultado en Normanton, Rutland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
